title: Smoky Dutch Little Gem Lettuce Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Dutch stew made with little gem lettuce, cooked to perfection in a clay pot with smoky flavors, perfect for a cozy evening meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Chop the little gem lettuce into small pieces and set aside.
Cook the diced smoked bacon in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside, leaving the grease in the skillet.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken broth, heavy cream, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the chopped little gem lettuce and cooked bacon to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a clay pot and cover with a lid.
Place the clay pot in the preheated oven and cook for 30 minutes.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
